75825.subject: Well Informed: Can you train for a heatwave?
75825.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzV9AAcAAAAAA-PJoouvLkOKJo6PF6yGEt97fG4mrYRg3j_UB37NrfIBZYn91rGuhHh72Y4E1OlWHfoLPaA2d3Q_0rLGnYAeQMiqFhEYjH8xJ7vcN7FoGeY9 

July 12th 2026

 

 
 
 
Well Informed

 Your evidence-based guide to health and wellness


 
 
 






 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzV9AAcAAAAAA-PJoouw_HC0hVV7NaBYiF6WIcguAcfOcZVCrzReiLPVZ1fUrQXzVvt47tLfKfy-wjJ88xCURivkV1V6rHNga5Pks_FhGTlXVwyX5p2cKohk 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzV9AAcAAAAAA-PJoouxgNjwaBfTaaS3t1D3rCvT1drd3IeJ4qS8mWGHi6GKc-qS_WIu7mjS58C4hCDyUnlI8DEolHg0AmS6QOvOXW5Q6hB82baQLAZVMQPT 



 Can you train for a heatwave?


 Tim Cross

Senior science writer


 England is enjoying/suffering under (delete according to taste) its third heatwave in three months. The heat doesn’t bother me as much as it bothers some. I grew up in South-East Asia, and spent my teenage years playing basketball in the school playground at lunchtime, in 320C temperatures and 85% humidity.


 I’m not sure I could do that now. Partly that’s because I’m middle-aged. But it’s also because I’m no longer acclimatised. The human body is an amazing machine and, given time, can adapt to all sorts of new requirements, muggy heat included. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MzV9AAcAAAAAA-PJoouy9RMCnTzNMlPL7_9uhFztKZNzkRYkfUIvr_CjL6rgPhxsssVq

75808.subject: The Daily Degen - July 11th, 2026
75808.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-july-11th-2026

Happy Saturday good degens! 
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.296T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $725.51
Gold: $4,119.40
Silver: $59.76
Oil (WTI): $71.41
US 10Y Treasury: 4.561%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 32
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Take note fine frogs! @Mantle_Official [ https://substack.com/redirect/f093cfcd-a221-40f8-abde-12daf88b0e44?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] continues to stack massive W’s in the world of RWA’s!
As explained in the thread below…
Mantle’s RWA history starts way back in 2023, when Ondo and their tokenized treasuries product $USDY first landed on Mantle…
Then came their MI4 fund…
And from there all sorts of huge advancements over the last year, including tokenized equities via @xStocksFi and @Fluxion_network, surging institutional capital focus via Aave and Maple Finance, and- mostly recently- pre-IPO vaults via @OpenstockInc!
This Openstock development is an especially big victory, positioning Mantle at the absolute forefront of the RWA race!
It is just one area that Mantle is stacking W’s in though, and you can learn more about everything else they are doing in their recent H1 breakdown [ https://substack.com/redirect/1bce24f9-c756-45ae-93b5-27e1c36aff84?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
Also make sure to follow @Mantle_Official [ https://substack.com/redirect/f093cfcd-a221-40f8-abde-12daf88b0e44?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] on Twitter/X, and stay tuned as we keep shining a light on everything that’s happening in their ecosystem!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. 12 of the top 25 chains are green on the weekly.
Protocols are also mixed today. 11 of the top 25 protocols are green on the weekly.
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Fee Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project called @rain__trade. Twitter bio states “Launch & trade predictions on any possible outcome. Earn as a creator, LP, or resolver. Built on @Rain__Protocol.” Followed

75764.subject: [Action Required] Identity Verification Advanced for EEA Users
75764.body:
Anti-phishing Code e2iWhGtX

Dear Bybit User,

As part of our ongoing commitment to regulatory compliance, Identity Verification Advanced – Proof of Address will be utilized for the categorization of users. You have been identified as a user with a completed, valid Proof of Address and confirmed your country of residence as part of the European Economic Area (EEA). If your country of residence has changed, please re-submit your Proof of Address.

Why is this required?
Bybit EU is our MiCAR-licensed entity authorized to serve EEA residents. Going forward, EEA residents (except for Malta) will be able to receive products and services through Bybit EU. Once our user migration plan is in place, access to services on Bybit Global will be progressively limited for users located in the EEA. Users will start receiving further communications about such changes in July. The right platform for you will be determined based on your country of residence, using your valid Proof of Address information.

What do you need to do?
If you are an existing user who has no up-to-date Identity Verification Advanced, please submit your current, valid Proof of Address at your earliest convenience.
You can update your Proof of Address here. ( http://url319.mail.bybit.com/ls/click?upn=u001.CaSbhUELMJv0fQMc2lSDT6KGdPabU83dpvSwrT0EseXsD9a2-2FZ9RIYbHR1Fs4p3T8xs4vVIX9pW2zXQ5uyNFAKJolTOL7q4ToYE0OE6GQUU-2BtOFxMlWTicN2wnez-2BDz44RKxQ8T-2FYfsxIy1gR2eDzDASS4bsOMlh-2B-2FNQ6oLC0ew-3DVhCm_mTOA-2BX07kQ2Ojbv-2BRbqdnpNrlwyNnm2KPByKJ9Ex4L2vKSlOXo5b9Zs41RNvLPkr1NnXoV-2FcPdW91qcbNZhKShJen3b1jWu9lT1-2Bl2O85gXIeXX2chQgWNpU6Byok6UDDGKWAGlDtATjmuL-2Fg5aoimhheB-2BL0yrmOen-2FL3dpzkD0efqq4I6zl4Fb08dNV4coNfKs9Y7pU-2BaF5wbSBzcT-2BTu-2FYYCaOD8WF15P-2BG4R9-2BDieN8td7W-2FIx1xnogxzEdU0ZuOAjnnGhVFFhmoceQnCxE0w5IizYnA7nfIDLGqH3MqZDm9QDUSg4srQeRJmj7TC4mVTRzgG2clOxvgG3n1k7Qs0e8PiViPkBLB6OdA97M3KvZi8sqrQ48DRJhVp8-2FX0EukBiDODS0OGmixLyWc3OZREgCnma1-2F6bX-2BdUmsfXvVKVQtoy5gAzpy1xXu8nXJYV7KbEt9uMQR53K78yz5pcFQtdurEf7vxBe40jxGWP2hLPvodO8CijRReHRsXV-2BL161OLqXThJsxVyB6oiZg-2F-2F96B6iZnQVw8ywlh2vN-2FDhn2SfQPdmp0XfasV7rKRNTROJybhH3jLiwqMOUuSC1BAo2CZ-2F-2B414vUzEZlA117WDv-2FwhFBGCAKAtOOx2MV8sirAZf2mBR-2F4wILMTPKN3iw38Wnef1WRhWnUhgggiKmfQryV-2FA6S1-2BALBGWheEbxLm28iBohAGtVLhJl-2BnoGsFGer501h4yT-2BkKQ-2FUvfA1OG6VRcG4SW0UHe3-2FKP2Mn9EUTypJUCOQLQo24kqy1DGrD9sijxv3ytQz-2FS-2FyJWmSTBM-3D )

75735.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 06/2026
75735.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice

75696.subject: SCONTO - výzva k odberu
75696.body: .apply-styles body{margin:0;padding:0}.apply-styles img{border:0!important;outline:none!important}.apply-styles p{Margin:0px!important;Padding:0px!important}.apply-styles table{border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0px;mso-table-rspace:0px}.apply-styles td, .apply-styles a, .apply-styles span{border-collapse:collapse;mso-line-height-rule:exactly}.apply-styles a[x-apple-data-detectors], .apply-styles u+.-wm-em_body a{color:inherit!important;text-decoration:none;font-size:inherit!important;font-family:inherit!important;font-weight:inherit!important;line-height:inherit}@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_hide{display:none!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_show{display:block!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_block{display:block!important;width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_max_width{width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pl10{padding-left:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pr10{padding-right:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pb10{padding-bottom:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-tac{text-align:center!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w107{width:107px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w150{width:150px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w270{width:270px!important}} Vážený zákazník, Vaša kúpna zmluva č. 3671916 je pripravená k odberu. Kúpnu zmluvu môžete uhradiť v hotovosti či kartou na pokladni obchodného domu alebo priamo vo výdajnom sklade na samoobslužnej pokladni platobnou kartou. Nezabudnite si so sebou vziať kúpnu zmluvu - budete ju potrebovať pri platbe a pri preberaní tovaru zo skladu. Štandardná doba výdaja sa zvyčajne pohybuje okolo 10 minút. V prípade rozsiahlejších objednávok alebo počas denných špičiek sa však táto doba môže výrazne predĺžiť. Ak chcete dobu výdaja skrátiť, zarezervujte si, prosím, niektorý z voľných termínov tu . Tovar pre vás pripravíme vopred. V prípade akýchkoľvek otázok nás neváhajte kontaktovať.
